title: lastrea apiciflora
intro: Lastrea apiciflora, also known as the apiculate lady fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Lastrea apiciflora include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Lastrea apiciflora can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of conditions.
